name: Wonton Cannoli
recipeIngredient: 1 pound lowfat Ricotta cheese, beaten smooth
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a deep fryer to 375°F (190°C).
2. Work with 6 wonton skins at a time. Keep the remainder well wrapped in waxed paper and draped with a lightly dampened towel.
3. Place a wonton skin on the work surface and set a cannoli tube diagonally across the center of it. If you don't have a cannoli tube, form a tube with some aluminum foil.
4. Bring the sides of the skin up over the tube. Seal overlapping tips with a dab of water.
5. Form wonton skins around the remaining 5 tubes. Cook, 2 tubes at a time, seam side down in hot oil for 30 seconds or just until golden.
6. Remove with tongs and drain on paper towels. While shells are still hot, gently push them off tubes with a small metal spatula and your fingers.
7. Repeat with the remaining skins and ensure the tubes cool completely before wrapping with the skins.
8. Filling: Combine ricotta, confectioners' sugar, vanilla, and chocolate. Cover and chill for 2 hours or overnight.
9. To serve: Spoon filling into cannoli shells. A pastry bag will be very helpful here, or cut a corner off of a sandwich bag and squeeze the mixture out of it. Dip each end of filling in pistachios.
10. Arrange on serving plate. Sift additional sugar over each and garnish with mint sprigs.
